caption_en: Distillation apparatus showing a brick-set kettle/still with vapor pipe leading to a tall tower containing a coiled condensing tube
Copper alembic still with condenser coil in a water-cooled receiving vessel, used for distillation in liqueur making
Distillation apparatus with boiler, condenser coil, and receiving vessel on stand, with numbered parts
Alembic distillation apparatus with copper boiler, condenser dome, coiled cooling tube, and collection vessel with spigot, mounted on a stand with a furnace base
Illustration of a distillation apparatus with furnace, boiler, condenser coil, and receiving vessel, operated by a man
Copper alembic still (Deroy) with condenser coil, showing boiler with botanicals basket, connecting arm to condenser tank, and cooling water fittings and taps
Copper alembic still with furnace base, dome cap, vapor arm, and coiled condenser (worm) in a water-cooled tank with spigot for collecting distillate
Copper alembic still with boiler, condenser coil, and cooling water tank, used for distillation in liqueur-making

Apparatus for liqueur preparation showing a heating vessel connected via tube R to an upper reservoir with tap, feeding into a cylindrical container E with valves h and h', and tube R' returning to the heating vessel

Two cross-sectional diagrams of a distillation apparatus (still), showing an outer flask with a cylindrical body and outlet tube; the right diagram reveals internal details including a perforated basket/diaphragm and support grid inside the neck.
Filtering stand with cloth suspended over a legged frame, dripping liquid into a basket-shaped filter below
Wooden frame (Fig. 14) used to hold a cloth filter bag for straining liqueurs
Filtration stand with two conical filter funnels and outlet taps, fed by a cylindrical reservoir on top
